title: Fix DataTable Date Column Sorting to Support ASC/DESC Order
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to sort date columns in ascending and descending order correctly, so I can find the most recent or oldest records easily.
description:
Date columns were not sorting correctly because the display format did not sort lexicographically. Two solution options were proposed:

1. Apply a date-type attribute in DataTables for proper date sorting
2. Use yyyy-mm-dd format which sorts naturally as text

The fix was applied across Reports and Dashboards, Initiatives, and Metrics pages.
acceptance_criteria: Date columns sort correctly in ascending order
Date columns sort correctly in descending order
Fix applied across Reports/Dashboards, Initiatives, and Metrics pages
ux_changes: Date columns now sort correctly in both ASC and DESC order.
middleware_changes: Applied DataTables date type attribute or sortable date format to date columns for correct chronological sorting.
implementation_notes: Used DataTables column type configuration to enable proper date sorting. Applied the fix across all three feature pages (reports-and-dashboards, initiatives, metrics).
comment_summary: Waqar fixed date sorting across Reports/Dashboards, Initiatives, and Metrics pages.
